title: FlashMemory-DeepSeek-V4: Lightning Index Ultra-Long Context via Lookahead Sparse Attention
summary: Conventional LLMs keep the full KV cache loaded during decoding, causing a severe GPU memory bottleneck for ultra-long context serving. In this report, we propose Lookahead Sparse Attention (LSA), a novel inference paradigm powered by a Neural Memory Indexer built upon the DeepSeek-V4 architecture.
descriptionCn: 《FlashMemory-DeepSeek-V4: Lightning Index Ultra-Long Context via Lookahead Sparse Attention》— 深度求索最新旗舰模型，支持百万 Token 超长上下文，多 Token 预测与 MLA 注意力机制大幅提升推理效率。

title: A Simulation Methodology Testbed for Typhoon Sensitivity Analysis: Framework Development and Perturbation-Response Experiments with the Pangu Weather Model
summary: Understanding how typhoons respond to localized perturbations in their environmental fields is fundamental to assessing the limits of predictability and exploring the potential for track or intensity intervention. This study develops a dedicated simulation methodology testbed for typhoon sensitivity
descriptionCn: 《A Simulation Methodology Testbed for Typhoon Sensitivity Analysis: Framework Development and Perturbation-Response Experiments with the Pangu Weather Model》— 华为盘古系列大语言模型，自研架构赋能多场景 AI 应用。

title: Qwen-Image-2.0 Technical Report

descriptionCn: 《Qwen-Image-2.0 Technical Report》— 阿里 (Qwen) 发布的最新研究论文。

title: Parameter-Efficient Neuroevolution for Diverse LLM Generation: Quality-Diversity Optimization via Prompt Embedding Evolution
summary: Large Language Models exhibit mode collapse, producing homogeneous outputs that fail to explore valid solution spaces. descriptionCn: 《Parameter-Efficient Neuroevolution for Diverse LLM Generation: Quality-Diversity》— Mistral 发布的最新研究论文。

title: DiagnosticIQ: A Benchmark for LLM-Based Industrial Maintenance Action Recommendation from Symbolic Rules
summary: Monitoring complex industrial assets relies on engineer-authored symbolic rules that trigger based on sensor conditions and prompt technicians to perform corrective actions. The bottleneck is not detection but response: translating rules into maintenance steps requires asset-specific knowledge gaine
descriptionCn: 《DiagnosticIQ: A Benchmark for LLM-Based Industrial Maintenance Action Recommenda》— Anthropic 发布的最新研究论文。

title: Illusion-Aware Visual Preprocessing and Anti-Illusion Prompting for Classic Illusion Understanding in Vision-Language Models
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) exhibit systematic bias toward visual illusions, recalling memorized facts rather than perceiving actual visual differences. descriptionCn: 《Illusion-Aware Visual Preprocessing and Anti-Illusion Prompting for Classic Illu》— Anthropic 发布的最新研究论文。

descriptionCn: 《Evaluating LLM-Generated Code: A Benchmark and Developer Study》— Anthropic 发布的最新研究论文。

title: Irminsul: MLA-Native Position-Independent Caching for Agentic LLM Serving
summary: Agentic LLM workloads put bit-identical tokens at shifted positions every turn, voiding prefix caches at the first byte of divergence. Operators report cache-hit regressions ranging from moderate slowdowns to severe TTFT spikes of 10-16s on unchanged content. Prior position-independent caching syste
descriptionCn: 《Irminsul: MLA-Native Position-Independent Caching for Agentic LLM Serving》— Mistral 发布的最新研究论文。

title: Language Models Can Autonomously Hack and Self-Replicate

descriptionCn: 《Language Models Can Autonomously Hack and Self-Replicate》— 阿里 (Qwen) 发布的最新研究论文。

descriptionCn: 《ZAYA1-8B Technical Report》— OpenAI 发布的最新研究论文。

descriptionCn: 《Coordination as an Architectural Layer for LLM-Based Multi-Agent Systems》— Anthropic 发布的最新研究论文。

descriptionCn: 《Retrieval and Multi-Hop Reasoning in 1M-Token Context Windows: Evaluating LLMs o》— DeepSeek 发布的最新研究论文。
